title: LarkMemory Benchmark Case Schema
description: Standard schema for LarkMemory enterprise memory benchmark test cases

case_id.description: Unique identifier for the test case, format: {category_abbr}_{NNN}

category.description: Dataset category this case belongs to

scenario.description: One-sentence description of the business scenario

difficulty.description: Difficulty level of this test case

input_events.description: Sequence of events to be ingested into the memory system

event_id.description: Unique event identifier within this case (e.g., e1, noise_1)

speaker.description: Name or role of the person who produced this event

content.description: Actual text content of the event

query.description: The retrieval query or task trigger sent to the memory system after ingestion

expected.description: Ground truth for scoring this case

should_retrieve.description: Whether the system should return a non-empty, relevant result

answer_keywords.description: Keywords that MUST appear in the system's response

should_not_contain.description: Strings that must NOT appear in the system's response

latest_value.description: For contradiction_update / knowledge_health: the correct up-to-date value

evidence_event_ids.description: event_id(s) in input_events that serve as ground-truth evidence

superseded_event_ids.description: event_id(s) that have been superseded and should NOT be cited as active

suggested_command.description: For command_memory / efficiency: the exact command the system should recommend

baseline_chars.description: For efficiency: character count without memory assistance

actual_chars.description: For efficiency: character count with memory assistance (user input only)

min_saving_rate.description: For efficiency: minimum required character/step saving rate

metrics.description: List of metric IDs to evaluate for this case
